V-M-030.checks: Verify AmneziaWG stealth profiles are generated within approved ranges, preserved on upgrade, applied with exact CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE parity, and rendered into every backend-generated client config path with nullable legacy-compatible preshared-key behavior.
V-M-030.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_awg_obfuscation.py tests/test_vpn_stealth_config.py tests/test_db_migrations.py tests/test_deploy_awg_obfuscation_static.py -v && cd .. && bash -n deploy/lib/awg-obfuscation.sh deploy/deploy-on-server.sh deploy/deploy-all.sh install.sh
V-M-030.anchors: AWG_PROFILE_GENERATED AWG_PROFILE_PRESERVED AWG_PROFILE_PARITY_OK AWG_CLIENT_CONFIG_RENDERED AWG_PSK_MIGRATED AWG_PROFILE_MISMATCH

verification-levels.level-1: Profile generation, parse, render, bounds, and mismatch detection are deterministic unit assertions.
verification-levels.level-2: Deploy static tests verify no hardcoded production profiles and scripts preserve profiles unless STEALTH_ROTATE=1.
verification-levels.level-3: Live RU/DE rollout verifies awg-client handshake, client awg0 handshake, and DE egress for a newly provisioned client.

evidence-matrix.evidence-profile-generation: test_awg_obfuscation.py asserts H1-H4, S1/S2, Jc, Jmin, Jmax ranges and rejects invalid values.
evidence-matrix.evidence-profile-parity: test_awg_obfuscation.py asserts RELAY_PROFILE equality before RU/DE service restart and CLIENT_PROFILE equality before config export.
evidence-matrix.evidence-upgrade-preservation: test_deploy_awg_obfuscation_static.py asserts existing profile parse path wins unless STEALTH_ROTATE=1 and helper validation aborts on any missing or invalid key.
evidence-matrix.evidence-client-rendering: test_vpn_stealth_config.py asserts raw config, Amnezia QR payload, device config, and manual CLI config share one renderer.
evidence-matrix.evidence-psk-migration: test_db_migrations.py asserts VPNClient.preshared_key_enc is nullable for legacy rows and encrypted for new rows.

scenarios.scenario-1: Fresh deploy creates distinct CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE using approved AmnezWG ranges.
scenarios.scenario-2: Upgrade deploy without STEALTH_ROTATE preserves existing AWG profiles and VPN port.
scenarios.scenario-3: RELAY_PROFILE matches on RU awg-client and DE awg0; CLIENT_PROFILE matches backend settings and RU awg0.
scenarios.scenario-4: New or rotated client config includes obfuscation values and PresharedKey while legacy NULL-PSK clients still render.
scenarios.scenario-5: Profile mismatch aborts deploy/service restart before breaking live tunnel state.
scenarios.scenario-6: Logs and deploy output redact private keys, PSKs, full configs, and raw profile dumps.

V-M-030.redaction: Never log private keys, preshared keys, full client configs, raw QR payloads, or complete live profile values.

autonomous-execution-safety.allowed: Unit tests, static script checks, XML/doc updates, and local config rendering tests may run autonomously.
autonomous-execution-safety.blocked: Live RU/DE deploy, STEALTH_ROTATE=1, port changes, and client profile rotation require explicit operator approval.

execution-evidence.local-tests: 15 passed with ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' for V-M-030 test files on 2026-04-19.
execution-evidence.syntax-checks: bash -n passed for deploy/lib/awg-obfuscation.sh deploy/deploy-on-server.sh deploy/deploy-all.sh install.sh and the remaining deploy scripts.
execution-evidence.published-rc: Commit 2d742a8fc190a8077c6b0dfbd35818c11cec899d pushed to origin/main after operator approval.
execution-evidence.environment-note: Exact pytest command without -o addopts='' is blocked in the current .venv because pytest-cov is not installed while backend/pyproject.toml adds --cov options globally.
execution-evidence.live-gates: Operator-confirmed pass on 2026-04-19: GitHub-main deploy, RU-DE handshake, new client handshake, DE egress, profile parity, and upgrade preservation without STEALTH_ROTATE all worked on VPS hosts.
execution-evidence.rotation-note: Explicit STEALTH_ROTATE=1 remains a separate operator-controlled rotation path because it intentionally changes profiles and requires client config reissue.
